description: Ralph Loop unified state file tracking wizard scan testing and full audit

security.notes: Cross-cutting CWE audit: CWE-78 (1 shell=True, nosec justified), CWE-79 (html.escape in reporters), CWE-89 (all parameterized ?), CWE-22 (validate_path_within_base), CWE-798 (os.getenv only), CWE-502 (no pickle/eval/exec), CWE-400 (timeouts present). 31 nosec comments all justified.

core.notes: Re-audited. 358 tests passed (history_db 224, dedup 70, normalize 65). All SQL queries use parameterized ?. get_query_plan f-string is dev-only helper not called in prod. config.py 180 tests pass.

cli.notes: 455 passed (jmo 65, orchestrator 52, progress 32, tool_commands 117, tool_manager 95, tool_installer 91). Security: shell=False verified, path traversal protected via validation.py+path_sanitizers.py, input validation via centralized validators.

adapters.notes: 1889 passed, 92% coverage. All 29 adapters use consistent patterns: safe_load_json/ndjson_file, normalize_severity/map_tool_severity. semgrep-secrets hyphen naming acceptable (matches tool_name).

reporters.notes: 392 passed, 1 skipped. XSS protection verified via _escape_html in simple_html_reporter.py.
